_description: Map ElevenLabs voice_id → local VoxCPM config. Lets one server handle both Pulse Gaming (Liam) and Sleepy Stories (Christopher) without restart. Path is relative to tts_server/. If voice_id hits the server and is missing here, the server falls back to REF_VOICE_PATH env var (default voice mode).

TX3LPaxmHKxFdv7VOQHJ.notes: Liam — moderate-pace clone. 25s ref extracted from output/audio/1sn9xhe.mp3 (real ElevenLabs render at natural speed — was previously a 15s clip from 1s4denn.mp3 with stretch artifacts already baked in, plus base_speed 2.6 causing phase-vocoder formant warble = demonic clone-of-a-clone). v2: cleaner ref + 1.4 stretch.

G17SuINrv2H9FC6nvetn.notes: Christopher — calm documentary narration, 85-95 WPM target. Needs 15-30s clean clone ref (not yet extracted).
